anchor.snippet: Fluid mechanics is the branch of physics concerned with the mechanics of fluids

Fluid statics or hydrostatics is the branch of fluid mechanics that studies fluids at rest.
Fluid dynamics is a subdiscipline of fluid mechanics that deals with fluid flow
